'''Darktrooper team two'''<ref name="Darktroopers">[[Dark Empire II 2|''Dark Empire II'' 2]] {{1stID|Darktrooper team two}}</ref> was a unit of [[darktrooper]]s specially trained [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] empowered with the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]]. They were under the command of [[Zasm Katth]], on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]]. The troopers wore [[Color/Legends|black]] [[Stormtrooper armor/Legends|stormtrooper armor]], which was standard for darktroopers.
